query: SELECT d.pipelineId, COUNT(*) as cnt, p.name as pipeline_name FROM deals d LEFT JOIN pipelines p ON d.pipelineId = p.id GROUP BY d.pipelineId, p.name LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3REGGwCEMbpiL33.root --database mLLZEfmfSEuH47dfeJgVGY --execute SELECT d.pipelineId, COUNT(*) as cnt, p.name as pipeline_name FROM deals d LEFT JOIN pipelines p ON d.pipelineId = p.id GROUP BY d.pipelineId, p.name LIMIT 10;
